message:
Add episodic-memory plugin to marketplace

BETA: UNTESTED - Semantic search for Claude Code conversations.
Provides conversation history search, indexing, and MCP tools.

files.patch:
@@ -41,6 +41,17 @@
       "version": "1.0.0",
       "keywords": ["writing", "style", "grammar", "composition", "clarity", "documentation"],
       "strict": true
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "episodic-memory",
+      "source": {
+        "source": "url",
+        "url": "https://github.com/obra/episodic-memory.git"
+      },
+      "description": "BETA: UNTESTED - Semantic search for Claude Code conversations. Remember past discussions, decisions, and patterns across sessions.",
+      "version": "1.0.0",
+      "keywords": ["memory", "search", "conversations", "semantic-search", "episodic", "history", "context"],
+      "strict": true
     }
   ]
 }
